'''âh-d-k''' ('''hedek''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:become female|become female]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:become female|become female]]
|-
! Citation form
| âh-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| hedek
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadakithi|hadakithi]] || [[word:hadakiji|hadakiji]] || [[word:hadakishi|hadakishi]] || [[word:hadaki|hadaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadakuthuth|hadakuthuth]] || [[word:hadakujuj|hadakujuj]] || [[word:hadakushush|hadakushush]] || [[word:hadak|hadak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadakuthu|hadakuthu]] || [[word:hadakuju|hadakuju]] || [[word:hadakushu|hadakushu]] || [[word:hadaku|hadaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadakufuth|hadakufuth]] || [[word:hadakufuj|hadakufuj]] || [[word:hadakufush|hadakufush]] || [[word:hadakuf|hadakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadakethe|hadakethe]] || [[word:hadakeje|hadakeje]] || [[word:hadakeshe|hadakeshe]] || [[word:hadake|hadake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadakothoth|hadakothoth]] || [[word:hadakojoj|hadakojoj]] || [[word:hadakoshosh|hadakoshosh]] || [[word:hadak|hadak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadakotho|hadakotho]] || [[word:hadakojo|hadakojo]] || [[word:hadakosho|hadakosho]] || [[word:hadako|hadako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadakofoth|hadakofoth]] || [[word:hadakofoj|hadakofoj]] || [[word:hadakofosh|hadakofosh]] || [[word:hadakof|hadakof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadakĂŻfĂŻf|hadakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻfĂŻf|hadakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻfĂŻf|hadakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻfĂŻf|hadakĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]] || [[word:hadakĂŻf|hadakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadakĂŠthĂŠ|hadakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hadakĂŠjĂŠ|hadakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hadakĂŠshĂŠ|hadakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hadakĂŠ|hadakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadakathath|hadakathath]] || [[word:hadakajaj|hadakajaj]] || [[word:hadakashash|hadakashash]] || [[word:hadak|hadak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadakatha|hadakatha]] || [[word:hadakaja|hadakaja]] || [[word:hadakasha|hadakasha]] || [[word:hadaka|hadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadakafath|hadakafath]] || [[word:hadakafaj|hadakafaj]] || [[word:hadakafash|hadakafash]] || [[word:hadakaf|hadakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hadakasha|hadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohadakasha|gohadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihadakasha|gokihadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadaknĂŒsha|hadaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohadaknknĂŒsha|gohadaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihadaknĂŒsha|gokihadaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadakshĂ«sha|hadakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadaknkshĂ«sha|gohadaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadakshĂ«sha|gokihadakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadakrosha|hadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadaknkrosha|gohadaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadakrosha|gokihadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hadakmusha|hadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadaknkmusha|gohadaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadakmusha|gokihadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hadaksherasha|hadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohadaknksherasha|gohadaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihadaksherasha|gokihadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hadakngasha|hadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohadaknkngasha|gohadaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihadakngasha|gokihadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hadakyasha|hadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohadaknkyasha|gohadaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihadakyasha|gokihadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hadakyamasha|hadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohadaknkyamasha|gohadaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihadakyamasha|gokihadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadaknĂŒshĂ«sha|hadaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohadaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihadaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadaknĂŒrosha|hadaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadaknknĂŒrosha|gohadaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadaknĂŒrosha|gokihadaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadaknĂŒmusha|hadaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadaknknĂŒmusha|gohadaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadaknĂŒmusha|gokihadaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadakshĂ«nĂŒsha|hadakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohadaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihadakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadakshĂ«rosha|hadakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadaknkshĂ«rosha|gohadaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadakshĂ«rosha|gokihadakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadakshĂ«musha|hadakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadaknkshĂ«musha|gohadaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadakshĂ«musha|gokihadakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadakronĂŒsha|hadakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadaknkronĂŒsha|gohadaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadakronĂŒsha|gokihadakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadakroshĂ«sha|hadakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadaknkroshĂ«sha|gohadaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadakroshĂ«sha|gokihadakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadakromusha|hadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadaknkromusha|gohadaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadakromusha|gokihadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadakmunĂŒsha|hadakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadaknkmunĂŒsha|gohadaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadakmunĂŒsha|gokihadakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadakmushĂ«sha|hadakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadaknkmushĂ«sha|gohadaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadakmushĂ«sha|gokihadakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadakmurosha|hadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadaknkmurosha|gohadaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadakmurosha|gokihadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hadak|hadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠdĂŠk|hĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohadak|hohadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠdĂŠk|hohĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohadak|hohohadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠdĂŠk|hohohĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhadak|nĂŒhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŒhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhadak|nĂŒnĂŒhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhadak|nĂŻhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŻhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhadak|nĂŻnĂŻhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhadak|luhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠdĂŠk|luhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhadak|luluhadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠdĂŠk|luluhĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihadak|lihadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠdĂŠk|lihĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihadak|lilihadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠdĂŠk|lilihĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohadak|kohadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠdĂŠk|kohĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohadak|kokohadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠdĂŠk|kokohĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehadak|kehadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠdĂŠk|kehĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehadak|kekehadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠdĂŠk|kekehĂŠdĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
